OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee; Not Reported.

Tony Ruch, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.

Zach Toran, Esq. representing the Defendant Malvin Hudson through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502-A, for settlement discussions.

Case settled, the trial date vacated. Settlement agreement filed in open court.
